name: 90 Minute Dinner Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together 3/4 cup flour, sugar, salt, and yeast.
2. Heat the milk, water, and butter to 120-130°F. Use an instant-read thermometer for accuracy.
3. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the dry ingredients and beat with a mixer at medium speed until combined.
4. Add an additional 1/4 cup flour and beat on high speed for 2 minutes. Stir in enough more flour to form a soft dough.
5. On a floured surface, knead the dough for 2-3 minutes. Alternatively, use the dough hook attachment of your mixer.
6. Divide the dough into 8-12 equal pieces. Shape each piece into a ball and place in an 8-inch round baking pan.
7. Pour enough boiling water into a large, shallow pan to create a depth of about 1 inch on the bottom rack of the preheated oven. Place the pan with rolls on the rack above the water. Cover tightly and let rise for 30 minutes.
8. Remove the cover and take the pan of water out of the oven.
9. Preheat the oven to 375°F. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the rolls are light golden brown in color. Transfer to a wire rack to cool. Serve warm.
